description: Rules proposed automatically by the Phase LEARN pipeline based on trending rubric-criterion failures. Each rule has a human approval gate before it ships.

guidelines.rule: Ensure cards are used to group distinct, related content or to present interactive entities within a collection, rather than merely wrapping simple lists or single, non-interactive items.
guidelines.why: The CARDS_JUSTIFIED criterion has a 42% fail rate across 12 recent evaluations, indicating frequent misuse of cards that adds unnecessary visual weight.
examples: BAD: A card containing only a single line of text like 'Task 1: Buy groceries'.
GOOD: A card displaying a product's image, name, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
